      YEARS OF  EXCELLENCE

      carisma spa locations

      Explore Carisma Spa locations around Malta, where bliss and relaxation meet. Each of our spas offers a serene environment, state-of-the-art facilities, and a wide range of rejuvenating treatments. Whether you are in the heart of the city or by the tranquil coast, you’ll find a Carisma Spa nearby, ready to provide an exceptional wellness experience. Visit us to unwind and revitalize at any of our convenient Malta locations.

      intercontinental hotel - st. julian's

      InterContinental Malta gives you the best experience: a wonderful waterfront resort completed with a private beach and water sports; a central cosmopolitan location close to shopping, entertainment, and historic sites; and an array of services appreciated by leisure and business travelers. Valletta, Mdina and the Mosta Dome are within easy reach.

      Facilities

      • Indoor Pool

      • ​Traditional Turkish Bath

      • Steam Room

      • ​Sauna

      • Halotherapy (Salt Room)

      • Relaxing Area

      • Couples Massage Facilities

      • Medical Aesthetics

      operating hours

      Monday - Sunday
      09:00 - 20:00
      Including Public Holidays

      address

      St George's Bay
      St Julian's
      Malta STJ 3310
      Malta

      CLICK TO SEE OUR INTERCONTINENTAL MENU

      hugo's h hotel - st. julian's

      Hugo's H Hotel is a luxurious, modern, adult-only hotel located at the heart of Malta's nightlife scene. Comfortable, well-equipped rooms can feature a balcony overlooking the city and St. George's bay, or a spa bath. These unique and stylish hotel allow for close access to many of Malta's sights and cities.

      Facilities

      • Indoor Pool

      • ​Traditional Turkish Bath

      • Steam Room

      • ​Sauna

      • Emotional Shower

      • Bucket shower

      • Tropical Garden Rooms

      • Relaxing Area

      • VIP Couples Massage Room Facilities

      operating hours

      Monday - Sunday
      09:00 - 20:00
      Including Public Holidays

      address

      St George's Bay

      St Julian's
      Malta STJ 3310
      Malta

      CLICK TO SEE OUR HUGO'S H HOTEL MENU

      1/18

      hyatt regency - st. julian's

      The newly opened Hyatt Regency is a hotel located in the heart of St Julians. It is a great location to allow you to explore the Island, and you can find nightlife hubs and beautiful coastlines within walking distance.

      Facilities

      • Indoor Pool

      • Sauna

      • Ice Room

      • Couples Massage Room

      operating hours

      Monday - Sunday
      09:00 - 20:00
      Including Public Holidays

      address

      St George's Bay
      St Julian's
      Malta STJ 3310
      Malta

      CLICK TO SEE OUR HYATT REGENCY MENU

      1/7

      ramla bay resort - MELLIEĦA

      Located along the most-northern coast of Malta, the picturesque Ramla Bay Resort is a hotel like no other on the Island. Just seconds from the crystal clear waters of the Mediterranean sea, it offers top facilities for rest and relaxation, as well as all the amenities required for a pleasant leisure or business stay.

      Facilities

      • Indoor Pool

      • Traditional Turkish Bath

      • Indoor Jacuzzi

      • Outdoor Jacuzzi

      • Sauna

      • Bucket Shower

      • Relaxing Room

      • Couple's Massage Room

      • Outdoor Sunbeds

      operating hours

      Monday - Sunday
      10:00 - 20:00
      Including Public Holidays

      address

      Triq Ir-Ramla,

       Il-Mellieħa Malta

      CLICK TO SEE OUR RAMLA BAY RESORT MENU
      explore

      1/20

      riviera spa resort - MELLIEĦA

      Riviera Spa Resort is located in one of the best-preserved areas of northern Malta and overlooks the scenic Marfa Bay. Unspoiled views over the islands of Gozo and Comino create an idyllic Mediterranean atmosphere of relaxation. 

      Facilities

      • Indoor Pool

      • Thalasso Pool

      • Indoor Jacuzzi

      • Sauna

      • Steam Room

      • Ice Room

      • Relaxing Room

      • Couple's Massage Room​

      operating hours

      Monday - Sunday
      10:00 - 19:00
      Including Public Holidays

      address

      Triq Ir-Ramla,

       Il-Mellieħa Malta

      CLICK TO SEE OUR RIVIERA spa resort MENU
      explore

      1/10

      ax odycY - QAWRA

      The AX ODYCY Hotel, located in vibrant Qawra, offers serviced self-catering apartments with resort facilities. Enjoy nearby beaches, shops, cafés, bars, and restaurants. The hotel features pools, a fitness center, and outdoor activities. Guests love exploring the area and strolling the scenic promenade, perfect for evening walks.

      Facilities

      • Indoor Pool

      • Indoor Jacuzzi

      • Sauna (Booking)

      • Couple's Massage Room​

      operating hours

      Monday - Sunday
      09:00 - 18:00
      Including Public Holidays

      address

      Qawra Coast Road,
      Qawra SPB 1981, ​Malta

      CLICK TO SEE OUR AX ODYCy MENU
      explore

      1/9

      grand hotel excelsior - valletta

      Just steps from Valletta, the Grand Hotel Excelsior rests by the sea — elegant, timeless, and quietly grand. Spacious rooms, sweeping views, and thoughtful comforts invite you to slow down, settle in, and feel at ease. A refined escape, where every detail is crafted with care.

      Facilities

      • Indoor Pool

      • Sauna

      • Steam Room

      • Relaxing Room

      • Couple's Massage Room​

      operating hours

      Monday - Sunday

      09:00 - 19:00

      Including Public Holidays

      address

      Great Siege Road, Floriana FRN 1810, Malta

      CLICK TO SEE OUR grand hotel excelsior spa MENU

      novotel malta sliema

      Novotel Sliema is a modern retreat with sea views over Ta’ Xbiex and Valletta. Spacious rooms, rooftop and indoor pools, a serene spa, and a fully equipped gym invite you to pause, recharge, and reconnect — where city life meets wellness ease.

      Facilities

      • Indoor Pool

      • Sauna

      • Steam Room

      • Cold Plunge

      • Bucket Shower

      • Couple's Massage Room​

      operating hours

      Monday - Sunday

      09:00 - 19:00

      Including Public Holidays

      address

      60 Triq Sir Frederick C. Ponsonby, Il-Gżira GZR 1070, Malta
